caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary under the title "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu." The split-screen format shows two individuals, both wearing traditional Nigerian attire, engaged in what seems to be a discussion or debate. On the left, a man in a red cap and patterned shirt is speaking, while on the right, another man in a blue cap and vest gestures with his hand, possibly emphasizing a point. The background suggests they are in different locations, with one setting appearing more formal and the other more casual. The segment likely delves into political issues concerning Nigeria, with Bola Tinubu's statement being a central theme. Viewers are encouraged to watch online at the provided website.
